content.full_text:
California 
Fair Political 
Practices Commission 
Jennie Tullo 
Legislative Assistant 
PRE COR 
P.O. Box 6452 
Westlake Village, CA 
91359 
Dear Ms. Tullo: 
August 17, 1988 
Re: 
Our File No. G-88-317 
We have received your letter concerning the status of the 
proposed regulation concerning payments for lobbying services 
(2 California Code of Regulations Section 18614). 
On June 8, 
1988, the Commission approved Regulation 18614 for adoption. 
We anticipate the regulation will become effective in late 
September. 
Enclosed is a copy of the regulation adopted by the 
Commission. 
To provide the background information you 
requested, I also have enclosed a copy of the notice and 
statement of reasons for the regulation, as well as a copy of 
the staff memorandum presented to the Commission at the June 8 
meeting. 
Questions about lobbying firm registration and reporting 
may be addressed to our Technical Assistance and Analysis 
Division at (916) 322-5662. 
Sincerely, 
K~O~~~ 
Counsel, Legal Division 
KED:plh 
Enclosures 
428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804~0807 • (916) 322~')()()O 


"PRECOR 
,.d
